_info: Agent-PC Tools for Open WebUI — Import from Admin Panel > Workspace > Functions
name: Agent-PC Tools
description: Tools for controlling the host machine from Open WebUI. Requires Agent-PC Server running in Docker.

tools.name: execute_command
tools.description: Execute a shell command on the Linux host machine. Use for system operations like checking disk space, listing processes, installing packages, etc.

command.description: The shell command to execute (e.g. 'df -h', 'ls -la /home', 'ps aux')

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read the contents of a file from the host. For large files, specify start_line and end_line.

path.description: Absolute path of the file to read (e.g. '/home/user/project/main.py')

tools.name: write_file
tools.description: Write or create a file on the host. Creates parent directories if they don't exist.

path.description: Absolute path of the file to write

content.description: Content to write to the file

tools.name: list_directory
tools.description: List the contents of a directory on the host.

path.description: Absolute path of the directory to list

tools.name: search_files
tools.description: Search for files containing a text pattern (uses grep).

pattern.description: Regex pattern or text to search for

directory.description: Directory to search in (default: workspace root)
